Operation 'getQuote' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary and description are too generic. data.current_description: Get real-time quote for a symbol.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve real-time market quote for symbol
data.description_suggestion: Fetches real-time market quote data for a specified trading symbol. Requires the symbol identifier and exchange code as input. Returns current price, bid-ask spread, volume, and other real-time market data. Useful for obtaining current market conditions before placing orders.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too generic. Added specificity about real-time nature, required inputs (symbol, exchange), expected outputs (price, bid-ask, volume), and use case context for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'getAllMarketData' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description lacks clarity on batch processing capability and efficiency benefits. Added details about input format (array of symbols), comprehensive output data, and performance advantage for AI agents to understand when to use this over individual quote requests.

data.current_description: Get market data for multiple symbols.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve market data for multiple symbols
data.description_suggestion: Fetches real-time market data for multiple trading symbols in a single request. Accepts an array of symbol identifiers with their exchange codes. Returns comprehensive market data including price, volume, bid-ask spreads, and other metrics for each symbol. More efficient than individual quote requests for batch data retrieval.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity on batch processing capability and efficiency benefits. Added details about input format (array of symbols), comprehensive output data, and performance advantage for AI agents to understand when to use this over individual quote requests.

message: Operation 'createGTTRule' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is adequate but description needs significant enhancement. Added clarity on GTT functionality (automatic execution on conditions), required inputs (symbol, trigger price, order type, quantity), return value (rule ID), rule lifecycle, and use case context for AI agents.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a Good-Till-Triggered (GTT) rule that automatically executes a predefined order when specified market conditions are met. Requires symbol, trigger price, order type, and quantity as inputs. Returns the created GTT rule with a unique rule ID. The rule remains active until triggered, cancelled, or expires. Useful for automated trading based on price levels.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description needs significant enhancement. Added clarity on GTT functionality (automatic execution on conditions), required inputs (symbol, trigger price, order type, quantity), return value (rule ID), rule lifecycle, and use case context for AI agents.

message: Operation 'listGTTRules' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is clear but description lacks detail about what data is returned and the scope of rules retrieved. Added information about rule status filtering, returned fields, and use case context for portfolio monitoring.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all active and inactive Good-Till-Triggered (GTT) rules for the authenticated user. Returns a list of GTT rules with details including rule ID, symbol, trigger price, order parameters, status, and creation timestamp. Useful for monitoring and managing automated trading rules.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description lacks detail about what data is returned and the scope of rules retrieved. Added information about rule status filtering, returned fields, and use case context for portfolio monitoring.

message: Operation 'modifyGTTRule' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is adequate but description needs enhancement. Added specificity about required inputs (rule ID, fields to update), return value, state constraints (only active/pending rules), and timing of changes for AI agent clarity.

data.description_suggestion: Modifies parameters of an existing Good-Till-Triggered (GTT) rule. Requires the rule ID and the fields to be updated (e.g., trigger price, quantity, order type). Returns the updated GTT rule with modified parameters. Only rules in active or pending status can be modified. Changes take effect immediately.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description needs enhancement. Added specificity about required inputs (rule ID, fields to update), return value, state constraints (only active/pending rules), and timing of changes for AI agent clarity.

message: Operation 'cancelGTTRule' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear but description lacks important details. Added specificity about required input (rule ID), return confirmation, permanent nature of cancellation, and use case context for AI agents to understand the irreversible action.

data.description_suggestion: Cancels an active Good-Till-Triggered (GTT) rule, preventing it from executing. Requires the rule ID as input. Returns confirmation of cancellation with the rule status changed to cancelled. Cancelled rules cannot be reactivated; a new rule must be created instead. Useful for stopping automated trading strategies.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description lacks important details. Added specificity about required input (rule ID), return confirmation, permanent nature of cancellation, and use case context for AI agents to understand the irreversible action.

data.current_description: Search for trading symbols by exchange and keyword.

data.description_suggestion: Searches for trading symbols (scrips) across specified exchanges using keyword matching. Accepts exchange code and search keyword as inputs. Returns matching symbols with their identifiers, full names, instrument types, and trading details. Useful for discovering available securities before placing orders or setting up market data subscriptions.

data.current_description: Refresh the JWT token using the refresh token.
data.description_suggestion: Generates a new JWT access token using a valid refresh token. This operation extends the authenticated session without requiring re-authentication. Requires the refresh token obtained from the generateSession endpoint. Returns a new JWT token that can be used for subsequent API requests. The new token has a standard expiration period.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks context about when this operation should be used (session extension), what triggers it (token expiration), and what the output contains. data.description_suggestion: Modifies parameters of an existing pending order including quantity, price, and order type. Requires the order ID of the target order. Changes take effect immediately in the order queue.

data.summary_suggestion: Cancel an existing order by order ID
data.description_suggestion: Cancels an existing order that has not yet been fully executed. Requires the order ID of the order to be cancelled. The order must be in a cancellable state (e.g., PENDING, OPEN). Returns confirmation of the cancellation with updated order status. After cancellation, the order will no longer be active in the market.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. Added clarity on what order states can be cancelled, required input (order ID), expected output (cancellation confirmation), and side effects (order becomes inactive). This helps AI agents understand preconditions and outcomes.

data.current_description: Convert position between product types (e.g., INTRADAY to DELIVERY).
data.description_suggestion: Converts an existing position from one product type to another (e.g., INTRADAY to DELIVERY, MARGIN to DELIVERY). data.current_description: Refresh the JWT token using the refresh token.
data.description_suggestion: Generates a new JWT access token using a valid refresh token. This operation extends the authenticated session without requiring re-authentication. data.description_suggestion: Places a new trading order for equities, derivatives, commodities, or currency instruments. data.description_suggestion: Modifies parameters of an existing pending order including quantity, price, and order type. Requires the order ID of the target order. Only orders in pending state can be modified. Validates new parameters against current margin availability. Returns updated order details with modification confirmation. Changes take effect immediately in the order queue.

data.summary_suggestion: Cancel an existing order by order ID
data.description_suggestion: Cancels an existing order that has not yet been fully executed. Requires the order ID of the order to be cancelled. The order must be in a cancellable state (e.g., PENDING, OPEN). Returns confirmation of the cancellation with updated order status. After cancellation, the order will no longer be active in the market.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. Added clarity on what order states can be cancelled, required input (order ID), expected output (cancellation confirmation), and side effects (order becomes inactive). This helps AI agents understand preconditions and outcomes.
